f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_apm_policy_f.short_description: Exports the APM policy or APM access profile from remote nodes.
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_apm_policy_f.description: Exports the APM policy or APM access profile from remote nodes.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_apm_policy_i.short_description: Manage BIG-IP APM policy or APM access profile imports
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_apm_policy_i.description: Manage BIG-IP APM policy or APM access profile imports.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_asm_advanced.short_description: Manage BIG-IP system ASM advanced settings
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_asm_advanced.description: Manage BIG-IP system ASM advanced settings.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_asm_dos_appl.short_description: Manage application settings for a DOS profile
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_asm_dos_appl.description: Manages Application settings for an ASM/AFM DOS profile.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_asm_policy_f.short_description: Exports the ASM policy from remote nodes.
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_asm_policy_f.description: Exports the ASM policy from remote nodes.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_asm_policy_i.description: Manage the policy imports for BIG-IP ASM policies.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_asm_policy_m.description: Manage BIG-IP ASM policies, create policies from templates, and manage global policy settings.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_asm_policy_s.short_description: Manages Server Technology on an ASM policy
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_asm_policy_s.description: Manages Server Technology on ASM policies.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_asm_policy_s.short_description: Manages Signature Sets on an ASM policy
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_asm_policy_s.description: Manages Signature Sets on an ASM policy.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_cgnat_lsn_po.description: Manage CGNAT LSN (Large Scale NAT) Pools.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_cli_alias.short_description: Manage CLI aliases on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_cli_alias.description: Allows for managing both private and shared aliases on a BIG-IP.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_cli_script.short_description: Manage CLI scripts on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_cli_script.description: Manages CLI scripts on a BIG-IP. CLI scripts, otherwise known as tmshell scripts or TMSH scripts, allow you to create custom scripts that can run to manage objects within a BIG-IP.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_command.short_description: Run TMSH and BASH commands on F5 devices
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_command.description: Sends a TMSH or BASH command to a BIG-IP node and returns the results read from the device. This module includes an argument that will cause the module to wait for a specific condition before returning or timing out if the condition is not met. This module is B(not) idempotent, nor will it ever be. It is intended as a stop-gap measure to satisfy automation requirements until such a time as a real module has been developed to configure in the way you need. If you are using this module, we recommend also filing an issue to have a B(real) module created for your needs.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_config.description: Manages a BIG-IP configuration by allowing TMSH commands that modify the running configuration, or merge SCF formatted files into the running configuration. Additionally, this module is of significant importance because it allows you to save your running configuration to disk. Since all F5 modules manipulate the running configuration, it is important you use this module to save that running config.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_configsync_a.short_description: Perform different actions related to config-sync
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_configsync_a.description: Allows running different config-sync actions. These actions allow you to manually sync your configuration across multiple BIG-IPs when those devices are in an HA pair.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_data_group.short_description: Manage data groups on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_data_group.description: Allows for managing data groups on a BIG-IP. Data groups provide a way to store collections of values on a BIG-IP for later use in things such as LTM rules, iRules, and ASM policies.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_device_auth.short_description: Manage system authentication on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_device_auth.description: Manage the system authentication configuration. This module can assist in configuring a number of different system authentication types. Note that this module can not be used to configure APM authentication types.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_device_auth_.short_description: Manage LDAP device authentication settings on BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_device_auth_.description: Manage LDAP device authentication settings on BIG-IP.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_device_auth_.short_description: Manages RADIUS auth configuration on a BIG-IP device
Manages the RADIUS server configuration of the device

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_device_certi.description: Module used to create and/or renew self-signed device certificates for BIG-IP.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_device_conne.short_description: Manages device IP configuration settings for HA on a BIG-IP.
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_device_conne.description: Manages device IP configuration settings for High Availability (HA) on a BIG-IP. Each BIG-IP device has synchronization and failover connectivity information (IP addresses) that you define as part of HA pairing or clustering. This module allows you to configure that information.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_device_dns.short_description: Manage DNS settings on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_device_dns.description: Manage the DNS settings on a BIG-IP device.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_device_group.short_description: Manage device groups on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_device_group.description: Managing device groups allows you to create HA pairs and clusters of BIG-IP devices. Usage of this module should be done in conjunction with the C(bigip_configsync_actions) to sync the configuration across the pair or cluster if auto-sync is disabled.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_device_group.short_description: Manages members in a device group
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_device_group.description: Manages members in a device group. Members in a device group can only be added or removed, never updated. This is because the members are identified by unique name values and changing that name would invalidate the uniqueness.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_device_ha_gr.short_description: Manage HA group settings on a BIG-IP system
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_device_ha_gr.description: Manage HA (High Availability) group settings on a BIG-IP system.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_device_httpd.short_description: Manage HTTPD related settings on a BIG-IP system
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_device_httpd.description: Manages HTTPD related settings on the BIG-IP. These settings are useful when you want to set GUI timeouts and other TMUI related settings.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_device_info.short_description: Collect information from F5 BIG-IP devices
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_device_info.description: Collect information from F5 BIG-IP devices. This module was called C(bigip_device_facts) before Ansible 2.9. The usage did not change.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_device_licen.short_description: Manage license installation and activation on BIG-IP devices
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_device_licen.description: Manage license installation and activation on a BIG-IP.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_device_ntp.short_description: Manage NTP servers on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_device_ntp.description: Manage NTP (Network Time Protocol) servers on a BIG-IP.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_device_sshd.short_description: Manage the SSHD settings of a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_device_sshd.description: Manage the SSHD (secure shell daemon) settings of a BIG-IP.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_device_syslo.short_description: Manage system-level syslog settings on BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_device_syslo.description: Manage system-level syslog settings on BIG-IP.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_device_traff.description: Supports managing traffic groups and their attributes on a BIG-IP.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_device_trust.short_description: Manage the trust relationships between BIG-IPs
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_device_trust.description: Manage the trust relationships between BIG-IP systems. Devices, once peered, cannot be updated. If updating is needed, the peer must first be removed before it can be re-added to the trust.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_dns_cache_re.short_description: Manage DNS resolver cache configuration on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_dns_cache_re.description: Manage the DNS resolver cache configuration on BIG-IP devices.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_dns_nameserv.short_description: Manage LTM DNS nameservers on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_dns_nameserv.description: Manages LTM DNS nameservers on a BIG-IP. These nameservers form part of what is known as DNS Express on a BIG-IP. This module does not configure GTM (DNS module) related functionality, nor does it configure system-level name servers that affect the ability of the base system to resolve DNS names.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_dns_resolver.short_description: Manage DNS resolvers on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_dns_resolver.description: Manage DNS resolvers on a BIG-IP system.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_dns_zone.description: Manage DNS zones on BIG-IP. The zones managed here are primarily used for configuring DNS Express on a BIG-IP. This module does not configure zones that are found in BIG-IP ZoneRunner.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_file_copy.short_description: Manage files in datastores on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_file_copy.description: Manages files on a variety of datastores on a BIG-IP.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_firewall_add.short_description: Manage address lists on BIG-IP AFM
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_firewall_add.description: Manages the AFM (Advanced Firewall Manager) address lists on a BIG-IP. This module can be used to add and remove address list entries.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_firewall_dos.short_description: Manage AFM DoS profiles on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_firewall_dos.description: Manages AFM (Advanced Firewall Manager) Denial of Service (DoS) profiles on a BIG-IP. To manage the vectors associated with a DoS profile, refer to the C(bigip_firewall_dos_vector) module.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_firewall_dos.short_description: Manage attack vector configuration in an AFM DoS profile
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_firewall_dos.description: Manage the attack vector configuration in an AFM (Advanced Firewall Manager) DoS profile. In addition to the normal AFM DoS profile vectors, this module can manage the device-configuration vectors. See the module documentation for details about this method.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_firewall_glo.short_description: Manage AFM global rule settings on BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_firewall_glo.description: Configures the global network firewall rules on AFM (Advanced Firewall Manager). These firewall rules are applied to all packets except those going through the management interface. They are applied first, before any firewall rules for the packet

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_firewall_log.short_description: Manages AFM logging profiles configured in the system
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_firewall_log.description: Manages AFM (Advanced Firewall Manager) logging profiles configured in the system along with basic information about each profile.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_firewall_log.short_description: Configures Network Firewall related settings of the log profile
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_firewall_log.description: Configures Network Firewall related settings of the log profile.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_firewall_pol.short_description: Manage AFM security firewall policies on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_firewall_pol.description: Manages AFM (Advanced Firewall Manager) security firewall policies on a BIG-IP.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_firewall_por.short_description: Manage port lists on BIG-IP AFM
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_firewall_por.description: Manages the AFM (Advanced Firewall Manager) port lists on a BIG-IP. This module can be used to add and remove port list entries.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_firewall_rul.description: Manages firewall rules in an AFM (Advanced Firewall Manager) firewall policy. New rules will always be added to the end of the policy. Rules can be re-ordered using the C(bigip_security_policy) module. Rules can also be pre-ordered using the C(bigip_security_policy) module and then later updated using the C(bigip_firewall_rule) module.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_firewall_rul.short_description: Manage AFM security firewall policies on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_firewall_rul.description: Manages AFM (Advanced Firewall Manager) security firewall policies on a BIG-IP.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_firewall_sch.description: Manage BIG-IP AFM (Avanced Firewall Manager) schedule configurations.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_gtm_datacent.description: Manage BIG-IP data center configuration. A data center defines the location where the physical network components reside, such as the server and link objects that share the same subnet on the network. This module is able to manipulate the data center definitions in a BIG-IP.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_gtm_dns_list.short_description: Configures the BIG-IP DNS system to answer TCP or UDP DNS requests
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_gtm_dns_list.description: Defines one or more Listener objects to control which protocols are available for the BIG-IP DNS system to process DNS requests. BIG-IP DNS Listeners allow TCP and UDP protocols.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_gtm_global.description: Manages global BIG-IP GTM (now BIG-IP DNS) settings. These settings include general, load balancing, and metrics related settings.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_gtm_monitor_.short_description: Manages F5 BIG-IP GTM BIG-IP monitors
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_gtm_monitor_.description: Manages F5 BIG-IP GTM (now BIG-IP DNS) BIG-IP monitors. This monitor is used by GTM to monitor BIG-IPs themselves.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_gtm_monitor_.short_description: Manages external GTM monitors on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_gtm_monitor_.description: Manages external GTM (now BIG-IP DNS) monitors on a BIG-IP.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_gtm_monitor_.short_description: Manages F5 BIG-IP GTM FirePass monitors
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_gtm_monitor_.description: Manages F5 BIG-IP GTM (now BIG-IP DNS) FirePass monitors.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_gtm_monitor_.short_description: Manages F5 BIG-IP GTM HTTP monitors
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_gtm_monitor_.description: Manages F5 BIG-IP GTM (now BIG-IP DNS) HTTP monitors.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_gtm_monitor_.short_description: Manages F5 BIG-IP GTM HTTPS monitors
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_gtm_monitor_.description: Manages F5 BIG-IP GTM (now BIG-IP DNS) HTTPS monitors.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_gtm_monitor_.short_description: Manages F5 BIG-IP GTM TCP monitors
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_gtm_monitor_.description: Manages F5 BIG-IP GTM (now BIG-IP DNS) TCP monitors.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_gtm_monitor_.short_description: Manages F5 BIG-IP GTM TCP half-open monitors
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_gtm_monitor_.description: Manages F5 BIG-IP GTM (now BIG-IP DNS) TCP half-open monitors.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_gtm_pool.description: Manages F5 BIG-IP GTM (now BIG-IP DNS) pools.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_gtm_pool_mem.description: Manages a variety of settings on GTM (now BIG-IP DNS) pool members. The settings that can be adjusted with this module are much more broad that what can be done in the C(bigip_gtm_pool) module. The pool module is intended to allow you to adjust the member order in the pool, not the various settings of the members. The C(bigip_gtm_pool_member) module should be used to adjust all of the other settings.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_gtm_server.description: Manage BIG-IP GTM (now BIG-IP DNS) server configuration. This module is able to manipulate the server definitions in a BIG-IP.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_gtm_topology.description: Manages GTM (now BIG-IP DNS) Topology Records. Once created, only topology record C(weight) can be modified.
Manages GTM (now BIG-IP DNS) Topology Regions.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_gtm_virtual_.short_description: Manages F5 BIG-IP GTM virtual servers
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_gtm_virtual_.description: Manages F5 BIG-IP GTM (now BIG-IP DNS) virtual servers. A GTM server can have many virtual servers associated with it. They are arranged in much the same way that pool members are to pools.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_gtm_wide_ip.short_description: Manages F5 BIG-IP GTM Wide IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_gtm_wide_ip.description: Manages the F5 BIG-IP GTM (now BIG-IP DNS) Wide IP.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_hostname.short_description: Manage the hostname of a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_hostname.description: Manage the hostname of a BIG-IP device.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_iapp_service.short_description: Manages TCL iApp services on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_iapp_service.description: Manages TCL iApp services on a BIG-IP. The API the system uses to communicate with on the BIG-IP is C(/mgmt/tm/sys/application/service/).

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_iapp_templat.short_description: Manages TCL iApp templates on a BIG-IP.
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_iapp_templat.description: Manages TCL iApp templates on a BIG-IP. This module allows you to deploy iApp templates to the BIG-IP and manage their lifecycle. The conventional way to use this module is to import new iApps as needed, or by extracting the contents of the iApp archive that is provided at downloads.f5.com, and then importing all the iApps with this module. This module can also update existing iApps provided the source of the iApp changed while the name stayed the same. Note that this module does not reconfigure any services that may have been created using the C(bigip_iapp_service) module. iApps are normally not updated in production. Instead, new versions are deployed and then existing services are changed to consume that new template. As such, the ability to update templates in-place requires using the C(force) option.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_ike_peer.short_description: Manage IPSec IKE Peer configuration on BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_ike_peer.description: Manage IPSec IKE Peer configuration on a BIG-IP device.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_imish_config.short_description: Manage BIG-IP advanced routing configuration sections
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_imish_config.description: This module provides an implementation for working with advanced routing configuration sections in a deterministic way.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_interface.short_description: Module to manage BIG-IP physical interfaces.
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_interface.description: Module to manage BIG-IP physical interfaces.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_ipsec_policy.short_description: Manage IPSec policies on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_ipsec_policy.description: Manage IPSec policies on a BIG-IP device.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_irule.short_description: Manage iRules across different modules on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_irule.description: Manage iRules across different modules on a BIG-IP device.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_log_destinat.short_description: Manages log destinations on a BIG-IP.
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_log_destinat.description: Manages log destinations on a BIG-IP device.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_log_publishe.short_description: Manages log publishers on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_log_publishe.description: Manages log publishers on a BIG-IP device.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_ltm_global.description: Manages global BIG-IP LTM settings. These settings include connection related settings.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_lx_package.short_description: Manages Javascript LX packages on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_lx_package.description: Manages Javascript LX packages on a BIG-IP. This module allows you to deploy LX packages to the BIG-IP and manage their lifecycle.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_management_r.short_description: Manage system management routes on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_management_r.description: Configures route settings for the management interface of a BIG-IP.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_message_rout.short_description: Manage peers for routing generic message protocol messages
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_message_rout.description: Manage peers for routing generic message protocol messages.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_message_rout.short_description: Manage the generic message parser profile.
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_message_rout.description: Manages the generic message parser profile for use with the message routing framework.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_message_rout.short_description: Manages static routes for routing message protocol messages
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_message_rout.description: Manages static routes for routing message protocol messages.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_message_rout.short_description: Manages router profiles for message-routing protocols
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_message_rout.description: Manages router profiles for message-routing protocols.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_message_rout.short_description: Manages configuration for an outgoing connection
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_message_rout.description: Manages configuration for an outgoing connection in BIG-IP message routing.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_monitor_dns.short_description: Manage DNS monitors on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_monitor_dns.description: Manages DNS health monitors on a BIG-IP.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_monitor_exte.short_description: Manages external LTM monitors on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_monitor_exte.description: Manages external LTM monitors on a BIG-IP device.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_monitor_ftp.short_description: Manage FTP monitors on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_monitor_ftp.description: Manage FTP monitors on a BIG-IP device.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_monitor_gate.short_description: Manages F5 BIG-IP LTM gateway ICMP monitors
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_monitor_gate.description: Manages gateway ICMP monitors on a BIG-IP LTM.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_monitor_http.short_description: Manages F5 BIG-IP LTM HTTP monitors
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_monitor_http.description: Manages F5 BIG-IP LTM HTTP monitors.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_monitor_http.short_description: Manages F5 BIG-IP LTM HTTPS monitors
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_monitor_http.description: Manages F5 BIG-IP LTM HTTPS monitors.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_monitor_icmp.short_description: Manages F5 BIG-IP LTM ICMP monitors
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_monitor_icmp.description: Manages ICMP monitors on a BIG-IP.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_monitor_smtp.short_description: Manage SMTP monitors on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_monitor_smtp.description: Manage SMTP monitors on a BIG-IP.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_monitor_snmp.short_description: Manages BIG-IP SNMP data collecting agent (DCA) monitors
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_monitor_snmp.description: The BIG-IP has an SNMP data collecting agent (DCA) that can query remote SNMP agents of various types, including the UC Davis agent (UCD) and the Windows 2000 Server agent (WIN2000).

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_monitor_tcp.short_description: Manages F5 BIG-IP LTM TCP monitors
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_monitor_tcp.description: Manages F5 BIG-IP LTM TCP monitors via iControl REST API.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_monitor_tcp_.short_description: Manages F5 BIG-IP LTM TCP echo monitors
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_monitor_tcp_.description: Manages F5 BIG-IP LTM TCP echo monitors.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_monitor_tcp_.short_description: Manages F5 BIG-IP LTM TCP half-open monitors
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_monitor_tcp_.description: Manages F5 BIG-IP LTM TCP half-open monitors.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_monitor_udp.short_description: Manages F5 BIG-IP LTM UDP monitors
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_monitor_udp.description: Manages F5 BIG-IP LTM UDP monitors.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_network_glob.short_description: Manage network global settings on BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_network_glob.description: Module to manage STP, Multicast, DAG, LLDP and Self Allow global settings on a BIG-IP.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_password_pol.short_description: Manages the authentication password policy on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_password_pol.description: Manages the authentication password policy on a BIG-IP device.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_policy.short_description: Manage general policy configuration on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_policy.description: Manages general policy configuration on a BIG-IP. This module is best used in conjunction with the C(bigip_policy_rule) module. This module can handle general configuration, like setting the draft state of the policy, the description, and items unrelated to the policy rules themselves. It is also the first module that should be used when creating rules, as the C(bigip_policy_rule) module requires a policy parameter.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_policy_rule.short_description: Manage LTM policy rules on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_policy_rule.description: This module manages LTM policy rules on a BIG-IP.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_pool.description: Manages F5 BIG-IP LTM pools via iControl REST API.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_pool_member.short_description: Manages F5 BIG-IP LTM pool members
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_pool_member.description: Manages F5 BIG-IP LTM pool members via the REST API.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_profile_anal.short_description: Manage HTTP analytics profiles on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_profile_anal.description: Manage HTTP analytics profiles on a BIG-IP device.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_profile_clie.short_description: Manages client SSL profiles on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_profile_clie.description: Manages client SSL profiles on a BIG-IP device.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_profile_dns.short_description: Manage DNS profiles on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_profile_dns.description: Manage DNS profiles on a BIG-IP. There are many DNS profiles options, each with their own adjustments to the standard C(dns) profile. Users of this module should be aware that many of the configurable options have no module default. Instead, the default is assigned by the BIG-IP system itself which, in most cases, is acceptable.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_profile_fast.description: Manages Fast L4 profiles. Using the FastL4 profile can increase virtual server performance and throughput for supported platforms by using the embedded Packet Velocity Acceleration (ePVA) chip to accelerate traffic.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_profile_ftp.description: Manages FTP profiles on the BIG-IP system.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_profile_http.short_description: Manage HTTP profiles on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_profile_http.description: Manage HTTP profiles on a BIG-IP device.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_profile_http.short_description: Manage HTTP2 profiles on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_profile_http.description: Manage HTTP2 profiles on a BIG-IP system.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_profile_http.short_description: Manage HTTP compression profiles on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_profile_http.description: Manage HTTP compression profiles on a BIG-IP device.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_profile_onec.short_description: Manage OneConnect profiles on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_profile_onec.description: Manage OneConnect profiles on a BIG-IP system.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_profile_pers.short_description: Manage cookie persistence profiles on BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_profile_pers.description: Manage cookie persistence profiles on BIG-IP system.
Manages source address persistence profiles on a BIG-IP.
Manages universal persistence profiles on the BIG-IP system.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_profile_serv.short_description: Manages server SSL profiles on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_profile_serv.description: Manages server SSL profiles on a BIG-IP system.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_profile_sip.short_description: Manage SIP profiles on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_profile_sip.description: Manage SIP profiles on a BIG-IP system.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_profile_tcp.short_description: Manage TCP profiles on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_profile_tcp.description: Manage TCP profiles on a BIG-IP system. There are many TCP profiles, each with their own adjustments to the standard C(tcp) profile. Users of this module should be aware that many of the available options have no module default. Instead, the default is assigned by the BIG-IP system itself which, in most cases, is acceptable.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_profile_udp.short_description: Manage UDP profiles on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_profile_udp.description: Manage UDP profiles on a BIG-IP system. There are many UDP profiles, each with their own adjustments to the standard C(udp) profile. Users of this module should be aware that many of the available options have no module default. Instead, the default is assigned by the BIG-IP system itself which, in most cases, is acceptable.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_provision.description: Manage BIG-IP module provisioning. This module will only provision at the standard levels of Dedicated, Nominal, and Minimum.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_provision_as.description: Manages BIG-IP module provisioning. This module will perform provisioning operations in an asynchronous way. See the Notes section for more information.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_qkview.description: Manages creating and downloading QKviews from a BIG-IP. The qkview utility automatically collects configuration and diagnostic information from BIG-IP systems, and combines the data into a QKView file. F5 Support may request you send or upload this QKview to assist in troubleshooting.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_remote_role.short_description: Manage remote roles on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_remote_role.description: Manages remote roles on a BIG-IP system. Remote roles are used in situations where user authentication is handled off-box. Local access control to the BIG-IP is controlled by the defined remote role, and authentication (and by extension, assignment to the role) is handled off-box.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_remote_syslo.short_description: Manipulate remote syslog settings on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_remote_syslo.description: Manipulate remote syslog settings on a BIG-IP system.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_remote_user.short_description: Manages default settings for remote user accounts on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_remote_user.description: Manages the default settings for remote user accounts on a BIG-IP system.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_routedomain.short_description: Manage route domains on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_routedomain.description: Manage route domains on a BIG-IP system. A route domain is a BIG-IP configuration object that isolates network traffic for a particular application on the network.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_selfip.short_description: Manage Self-IPs on a BIG-IP system
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_selfip.description: Manage Self-IP addresses on a BIG-IP system.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_service_poli.short_description: Manages service policies on a BIG-IP.
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_service_poli.description: Service policies allow you to configure timers and port misuse rules (if enabled) on a per rule or per context basis.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_smtp.short_description: Manages SMTP settings on the BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_smtp.description: Allows configuring of the BIG-IP to send mail via an SMTP server by configuring the parameters of an SMTP server.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_snat_pool.short_description: Manage SNAT pools on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_snat_pool.description: Manage SNAT pools on a BIG-IP system.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_snat_transla.short_description: Manage SNAT translations on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_snat_transla.description: Manage SNAT translations on a BIG-IP system.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_snmp.short_description: Manipulate general SNMP settings on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_snmp.description: Manipulate general SNMP settings on a BIG-IP system.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_snmp_communi.short_description: Manages SNMP communities on a BIG-IP.
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_snmp_communi.description: Assists in managing Simple Network Management Protocol (SNMP) communities on a BIG-IP system. Different SNMP versions are supported by this module. Note the different parameters offered by this module, as different parameters work for different versions of SNMP. This is important if you are mixing versions C(v2c) and C(3).

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_snmp_trap.short_description: Manipulate SNMP trap information on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_snmp_trap.description: Manipulate SNMP trap information on a BIG-IP system.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_software_ima.short_description: Manage software images on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_software_ima.description: Manages software images on a BIG-IP. These images may include both base images and hotfix images.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_software_ins.short_description: Install software images on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_software_ins.description: Install new software images on a BIG-IP system.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_software_upd.short_description: Manage the software update settings of a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_software_upd.description: Manage the software update settings of a BIG-IP.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_ssl_certific.description: This module imports/deletes SSL certificates on BIG-IP LTM. Certificates can be imported from certificate and key files on the local disk, in PEM format.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_ssl_csr.short_description: Create SSL CSR files on the BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_ssl_csr.description: This module will create SSL CSR files on a BIG-IP. CSRs require an associated SSL key to pre-exist on the BIG-IP.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_ssl_key.description: This module imports/deletes SSL keys on a BIG-IP. Keys can be imported from key files on the local disk, in PEM format.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_ssl_key_cert.short_description: Import/Delete SSL keys and certs from BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_ssl_key_cert.description: This module imports/deletes SSL keys and certificates on a BIG-IP. Keys can be imported from key files on the local disk, in PEM format. Certificates can be imported from certificate and key files on the local disk, in PEM format.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_ssl_ocsp.description: Manage OCSP configurations on a BIG-IP system.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_static_route.short_description: Manipulate static routes on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_static_route.description: Manipulate static routes on a BIG-IP system.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_sys_daemon_l.short_description: Manage BIG-IP tmm daemon log settings

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_timer_policy.short_description: Manage timer policies on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_timer_policy.description: Manage timer policies on a BIG-IP system.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_traffic_sele.short_description: Manage IPSec Traffic Selectors on BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_traffic_sele.description: Manage IPSec Traffic Selectors on BIG-IP.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_tunnel.description: Manages tunnels on a BIG-IP. Tunnels are usually based upon a tunnel profile which defines both default arguments and constraints for the tunnel. Due to this, this module exposes a number of settings that may or may not be related to the type of tunnel you are working with. It is important that you take this into consideration when declaring your tunnel config. If a specific tunnel does not support the parameter you are considering, the documentation of the parameter will usually make mention of this. Otherwise, when configuring that parameter on the device, the device will notify you.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_ucs.short_description: Manage upload, installation, and removal of UCS files
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_ucs.description: Manage the upload, installation, and removal of UCS files on a BIG-IP system. A user configuration set (UCS) is a backup file that contains BIG-IP configuration data that can be used to fully restore a BIG-IP system in the event of a failure or RMA replacement.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_ucs_fetch.short_description: Fetches a UCS file from remote nodes
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_ucs_fetch.description: This module is used for fetching UCS files from remote machines and storing them locally in a file tree, organized by hostname. This module was written to create and transfer UCS files that might not be present, it does not require UCS file to be pre-created. So a missing remote UCS is not an error unless C(fail_on_missing) is set to

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_user.short_description: Manage user accounts and user attributes on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_user.description: Manage user accounts and user attributes on a BIG-IP system. Typically this module operates only on REST API users and not CLI users. When specifying C(root), you may only change the password. Your other parameters are ignored in this case. Changing the C(root) password is not an idempotent operation. Therefore, it changes the password every time this module attempts to change it.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_vcmp_guest.short_description: Manages vCMP guests on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_vcmp_guest.description: Manages vCMP (Virtual Clustered Multiprocessing) guests on a BIG-IP. This functionality only exists on actual hardware and must be enabled by provisioning C(vcmp) with the C(bigip_provision) module.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_virtual_addr.short_description: Manage LTM virtual addresses on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_virtual_addr.description: Manage LTM virtual addresses on a BIG-IP system.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_virtual_serv.short_description: Manage LTM virtual servers on a BIG-IP
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_virtual_serv.description: Manage LTM virtual servers on a BIG-IP system.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_vlan.short_description: Manage VLANs on a BIG-IP system
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_vlan.description: Manage VLANs on a BIG-IP system

f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_wait.short_description: Wait for a BIG-IP condition before continuing
f5networks.f5_modules.bigip_wait.description: With this module, you can wait for BIG-IP to be

f5networks.f5_modules.bigiq_application_.description: Manages BIG-IQ applications used for load balancing an HTTP-based application, speeding up connections and reducing the number of connections to the back-end server.
Manages BIG-IQ applications used for load balancing a TCP-based application with a FastL4 profile.
Manages BIG-IQ applications used for load balancing a UDP-based application. with a FastL4 profile.
Manages BIG-IQ applications used for load balancing an HTTP application on port 80 on BIG-IP systems.
Manages BIG-IQ applications used for load balancing an HTTPS application on port 443 with SSL offloading on a BIG-IP.
Manages BIG-IQ applications used for load balancing an HTTPS application on port 443 with a Web Application Firewall (WAF) using an ASM (Application Security Manager) Rapid Deployment policy.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigiq_device_disco.description: Discovers and imports BIG-IP device configuration on the BIG-IQ.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigiq_device_info.short_description: Collect information from F5 BIG-IQ devices
f5networks.f5_modules.bigiq_device_info.description: Collect information from F5 BIG-IQ devices. This module was called C(bigiq_device_facts) before Ansible 2.9. The usage did not change.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigiq_regkey_licen.short_description: Manages licenses in a BIG-IQ registration key pool
f5networks.f5_modules.bigiq_regkey_licen.description: Manages licenses in a BIG-IQ registration key pool.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigiq_regkey_licen.short_description: Manage regkey license assignment on BIG-IPs from a BIG-IQ
f5networks.f5_modules.bigiq_regkey_licen.description: Manages the assignment of regkey licenses on a BIG-IQ. Assignment means the license is assigned to a BIG-IP, or it needs to be assigned to a BIG-IP. Additionally, this module supports revoking the assignments from BIG-IP devices.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigiq_regkey_pool.short_description: Manages registration key pools on BIG-IQ
f5networks.f5_modules.bigiq_regkey_pool.description: Manages registration key (regkey) pools on a BIG-IQ. These pools function as a container in which you add lists of registration keys. To add registration keys, use the C(bigiq_regkey_license) module.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigiq_utility_lice.short_description: Manage utility licenses on a BIG-IQ
f5networks.f5_modules.bigiq_utility_lice.description: Manages utility licenses on a BIG-IQ. Utility licenses are one form of license that BIG-IQ can distribute. These licenses, unlike regkey licenses, do not require a pool to be created before creation. Additionally, when assigning them, you assign by offering instead of key.

f5networks.f5_modules.bigiq_utility_lice.short_description: Manage utility license assignment on BIG-IPs from a BIG-IQ
f5networks.f5_modules.bigiq_utility_lice.description: Manages the assignment of utility licenses on a BIG-IQ. Assignment means the license is assigned to a BIG-IP, or it needs to be assigned to a BIG-IP. Additionally, this module supports revoking the assignments from BIG-IP devices.
